summary: Project for 'Creative Prints and Design' - a print and design platform with admin access functionality.
known_issues: Logo/branding was incorrectly changed to 'cp&d' instead of 'Creative Prints and Design'
Admin access flow is missing or not easily discoverable
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Circular logo featuring a dark navy blue 3D printer inside a circle with a teardrop/filament drip element, overlaid with bold white text reading 'Creative Prints' in two lines, clean white background (creative-prints-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Update all instances of the app name displayed in the UI (header, page title, footer, any branding text) from 'cp&d' or any abbreviation to 'Creative Prints and Design'.
Replace the current logo in the app header/navbar with the uploaded logo image (creative-prints-logo.dim_256x256.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix branding: app name should display 'Creative Prints and Design' (not 'cp&d')
Fix or implement admin access flow so admins can log in/access admin panel
